videos.headline: Jaylen Jones makes a huge interception for Virginia Tech
videos.description: Virginia Tech safety Jaylen Jones gets a huge interception in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaylen Jones makes a huge interception for Virginia Tech) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Virginia Tech blocks a kick and runs it back for a TD
videos.description: Virginia Tech blocks a field goal and Quentin Reddish runs it back for a 77-yard touchdown to put the Hokies on top of Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Virginia Tech blocks a kick and runs it back for a TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson's Cole Turner scores a 29-yard touchdown
videos.description: Cole Turner scores a 29-yard touchdown to tie the game 7-7 in the third quarter vs. Virginia Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson's Cole Turner scores a 29-yard touchdown) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: 'What a time to be alive!' Clemson's Cade Klubnik works magic for a TD pass
videos.description: Cade Klubnik makes an impressive 41-yard touchdown pass to T.J. Moore as Clemson takes the lead over Virginia Tech in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ('What a time to be alive!' Clemson's Cade Klubnik works magic for a TD pass) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson's Jake Briningstool scores a 12-yard TD
videos.description: Cade Klubnik throws a 12-yard touchdown to Jake Briningstool to give Clemson a 21-7 lead vs. Virginia Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson's Jake Briningstool scores a 12-yard TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Virginia Tech's Gabe Williams leaves field via ambulance
videos.description: After sustaining an apparent injury, VT linebacker Gabe Williams exits the field in an ambulance.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Virginia Tech's Gabe Williams leaves field via ambulance) 2024/11/09 ESHEET
